posts.text:
PRESIDENT TRUMP: “Some major politicians refuse to say the word God. They don’t want to say it. I say it.”

Thank you, Mr. President.

God bless you.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: This 26 year old video of President Trump has remerged and gone viral proving he's ALWAYS been consistent.

God bless you, Mr. Best President!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Virginia State Rep. Tom Garrett just UNLEASHED on Virginia Democrats trying to make nearly all Virginia gun owners CRIMINALS if their new bill becomes law.

God bless State Rep. Garrett!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Switzerland police just brought out the WATER CANNONS to put a stop to Marxists and pro-Islamist rioters in the streets.

Can this be done in America?

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: This retired Police Officer and now school bus driver just went viral for leaving his job rather than take off his MAGA hat.

The school district banning the MAGA hat should be DEFUNDED!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Democrats going BERSERK as pro-gun activists pass out 30-round AR-15 magazines for FREE outside of the Virginia State Capitol before it's set to BAN the sale of these magazines.

What about the 2nd Amendment?

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: For the first time in NEARLY A DECADE, the United States flag was just raised over Venezuela's U.S. embassy under President Trump.

God bless Trump, who history will look back on as the GREATEST PRESIDENT EVER!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Gavin Newsom has been EXPOSED for an estimated HALF A TRILLION DOLLARS of fraud in taxpayer funds under his leadership.

These fraudsters need to be held responsible!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Congressman @realBrandonGill is going viral for his refusal to vote for any Senate bill besides DHS funding until the SAVE America Act is passed by the Senate.

God bless Rep. Brandon Gill!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump just posted his EPIC TAKEDOWN of the Fake News Media as he "RESHAPES" them into real news.

God bless you, Mr. Best President!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Movie star and First Lady Melania Trump is now in the motorcade with President Trump headed to the beautiful Mar-a-Lago.

God bless our incredible First Family.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: After another week of WORKING FOR FREE for the American people, President Trump just boarded Air Force One for his beautiful Mar-a-Lago club.

No one works harder than TRUMP!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Country Americans and fans all around the world just ERUPTED in JOY after seeing President Trump put on a cowboy hat in the Oval Office.

God bless President Trump!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BEAUTIFUL: Both President Trump and @JakePaul acknowledged how “beautiful” each other’s wives are.

“You’re not allowed to say ‘beautiful.’ It’s the end of your political career. But you know what? She’s beautiful.”

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: VP @JDVance just set his sights on SOMALI FRAUD and called out the "Quality Learing Center" exposed by @NickShirleyy.

"I don't know about you, but I don't want to send my kids to a school where they cannot spell learn."

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump just WON another group of voters the Democrats pretend to care about - The gay vote.

“We support gays. They throw gays off the buildings.”

Black people, women, & gay people are realizing Democrats have simply been using them.

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump just confirmed to @JakePaul he once broke up a fight Kobe Bryant was in.

"Kobe was having a hard time with somebody, and it worked out fine, but yeah, I broke it up."

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump just called out the hypocrisy of Democrats claiming to support gay people while supporting terrorists who kill them.

"'We support gays,' but they throw gays off buildings."

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video
